Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class SizeValidatorNoOp

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<SizeValidator,​Integer>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.SizeValidatorNoOp
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<SizeValidator,​Integer>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<SizeValidator,​Integer>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<SizeValidator,​Integer>, ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<SizeValidator,​Integer>, SizeValidator
public final class SizeValidatorNoOp
extends AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<SizeValidator,​Integer>
implements SizeValidator
A SizeValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
